title: Advances in the application of comprehensive two-dimensional gas chromatography in metabolomics.
author: Keppler EAH Jenkins CL Davis TJ Bean HD
content: S-EPMC6333419 PMC6333419 Advances in the application of comprehensive two-dimensional gas chromatography in metabolomics. Due to excellent separation capacity for complex mixtures of chemicals, comprehensive two-dimensional gas chromatography (GC × GC) is being utilized with increasing frequency
